ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., RssiInterrupt, PreambleDetect) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., trigger, alarm, notification) */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that occurred */,
  "reader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the RFID reader that triggered the event */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the event (e.g., tag ID, signal strength) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_reader_id FOREIGN KEY ("reader_id") REFERENCES readers ("reader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function (e.g., AGC, AFC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of function (e.g., configuration, control, monitoring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function configuration */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function being configured */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_configurations_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reader_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reader configuration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that triggers the configuration */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function that is triggered by the event */,
  "agc_auto_on" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if AGC is automatically turned on */,
  "afc_auto_on" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if AFC is automatically turned on */,
  "rx_trigger" TEXT /* Receive trigger settings (binary representation) */,
  "antenna_gain" TEXT /* Antenna gain setting */,
  "frequency_hop" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if frequency hopping is enabled */,
  "transmit_power" TEXT /* Transmit power setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reader_configurations_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reader_configurations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readers" (
  "reader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RFID reader */,
  "reader_name" TEXT /* Name of the RFID reader */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the RFID reader is installed */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration settings for the reader */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the reader */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Current hardware version of the reader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readers_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES reader_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring event */,
  "reader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the RFID reader being monitored */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the monitoring event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the RFID reader (e.g., OK, Error) */,
  "cpu_usage" TEXT /* Current CPU usage of the reader */,
  "memory_usage" TEXT /* Current memory usage of the reader */,
  "tag_count" INTEGER /* Number of tags detected by the reader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_monitoring_reader_id FOREIGN KEY ("reader_id") REFERENCES readers ("reader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_monitoring_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "reader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the RFID reader being monitored */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., read rate, write rate) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_performance_reader_id FOREIGN KEY ("reader_id") REFERENCES readers ("reader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technician) */,
  "reader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the RFID reader the user has access to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_reader_id FOREIGN KEY ("reader_id") REFERENCES readers ("reader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, configuration change) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware update */,
  "reader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the RFID reader that was updated */,
  "update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the firmware update */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version that was updated to */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the firmware update (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_updates_reader_id FOREIGN KEY ("reader_id") REFERENCES readers ("reader_id")
)
